hero.title: Rental management in Marrakech
hero.subtitle: Let us manage your property's rental — we take care of everything. Stress-free, professional management from start to finish.

services.heading: Our management services
services.subheading: End-to-end support to rent out your property with complete peace of mind.

tenantSearch.title: Tenant search
tenantSearch.description: Rigorous candidate selection, with thorough vetting of applications and guarantees.

inventory.title: Inventory reports
inventory.description: Drafting and managing legally compliant move-in and move-out inventory reports.

rentGuarantee.title: Unpaid rent protection
rentGuarantee.description: Rental protection insurance to safeguard your rental income.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Coordination of plumbing, electrical, gardening and other interventions.

taxFiling.title: Tax filing
taxFiling.description: Support with your tax declarations in Morocco.

pricing.heading: Our plans
pricing.subheading: Choose the plan that fits your needs.
pricing.subtitle: of monthly rent

cta.heading: Rent out your property with confidence
cta.subtitle: Let's talk about your rental management project. Our team will design a tailor-made solution for you.

concierge.heading: Concierge — short-let management
concierge.subheading: Is your property empty part of the year? We turn it into a short-let (Airbnb, Booking) and take care of everything while you earn income effortlessly.

listing.title: Listing and professional photos
listing.description: We list your property on Airbnb, Booking and other platforms with professional photos and an optimised listing.

pricing.title: Dynamic pricing
pricing.description: We adjust rates by season and demand to maximise your income.

guests.title: Bookings and guests
guests.description: We handle bookings and guest communication before, during and after each stay.

checkin.title: Check-in and check-out
checkin.description: Guest welcome, key handover and property inspection at every arrival and departure.

cleaning.title: Cleaning and laundry
cleaning.description: Professional cleaning and fresh linen between every stay.

reporting.title: Maintenance and reporting
reporting.description: Routine maintenance and a monthly income and occupancy report.

model.heading: How it works
model.body: You remain the owner and decide when your property is available. We handle the entire operation and charge a commission on rental income — with no fixed fees.

cta.note: Tailored commission based on your property.
